summary: South Bay startups closed nearly $4 billion in funding over the past six weeks, with Nexthop AI's $500M Series B and SiFive's $400M raise leading the pack. The wave spans AI, robotics, and hardware—from Rhoda AI and Mind Robotics in Palo Alto to RoboForce in Milpitas—signaling sustained investor appetite despite a crowded market. On the hiring front, most local firms are holding steady, though seven are actively expanding teams.
